name: Textarea
description: A resizable textarea input element. Fires 'input' on each keystroke and 'change' on blur.

attributes.name: placeholder
attributes.label: Placeholder
attributes.description: Placeholder text shown when the textarea is empty.

attributes.name: value
attributes.label: Initial Value
attributes.description: Initial text content of the textarea.

attributes.name: maxlength
attributes.label: Max Length
attributes.description: Maximum number of characters allowed. Leave 0 for no limit.

attributes.name: readonly
attributes.label: Read Only
attributes.description: Makes the textarea read-only — text can be selected but not edited.

attributes.name: resize
attributes.label: Resize
attributes.description: Controls which directions the user can resize the textarea.

events.name: input
events.label: Input
events.description: Fired on every keystroke while the textarea is focused. Use this for real-time value tracking.

events.name: change
events.label: Change
events.description: Fired when the user leaves the textarea after modifying its value. Equivalent to a blur-after-edit event.

methods.name: selectRange
methods.label: Select Text in Range
methods.description: Selects a portion of the textarea text between the given start and end character indices.

methods.name: selectAll
methods.label: Select All Text
methods.description: Selects all text in the textarea.
